    - type: submission

    - Account in good standing
  review_timeline: Not specified
  credit_application: Applied to your bill for the next month after you request it
global_exclusions:
  - Scheduled Maintenance
  - Force Majeure events

8x8 is a Communication & Collaboration provider. See the official SLA at [https://cdn.8x8.com/files/mfagl40e/production/b589e8dcc5ff6d672e991eea424a3c4674baec5b.pdf](https://cdn.8x8.com/files/mfagl40e/production/b589e8dcc5ff6d672e991eea424a3c4674baec5b.pdf) (8x8 Service Level Agreement (UCaaS/CCaaS), Version: December 3, 2024).

<!--
Verified 2026-06-19 against 8x8's published SLA (UCaaS/CCaaS), Version December 3, 2024
(https://cdn.8x8.com/files/mfagl40e/production/b589e8dcc5ff6d672e991eea424a3c4674baec5b.pdf).

The previous sla_url (https://www.8x8.com/terms-and-conditions/service-level-agreement) now
returns a 404 ("Whoops / Looks like the page you're looking for doesn't exist"). 8x8 no longer
publishes that standalone page; the live, official SLA document with the verbatim uptime
commitment, credit table, and claim terms is the CDN PDF now used as sla_url.

Key corrections from the verified SLA text:
- Uptime Commitment: "8x8 commits to monthly Service Availability of 99.999% for the Covered
  Services" (confirmed; unchanged).
- Service credit table (was 10/25/100 at 99.999/99.99/99.9 - INCORRECT). Verbatim table:
    99.90% to 99.998% -> 5%
    99.50% to 99.899% -> 10%
    99.00% to 99.499% -> 30%
    Less than 99.000% -> "30% plus 5% credit for each 0.1% of lost availability, up to a max of
    50% credit."
- Maximum credit is 50% (was recorded as 100% - INCORRECT).
- Credits are request-based, not automatic: "you will have the right to request a service credit."
- Two deadlines: "(a) open an 8x8 support ticket regarding the issue ... within 2 business days
  after the issue occurred, (b) request such service credit via notice to 8x8 within 30 days
  after you become eligible for it (otherwise, you waive your right to such credit), and (c) keep
  your account in good standing."
- Credit application: "8x8 will apply any service credit to your bill for the next month after
  you request it."
- Covered Services are only UCaaS and CCaaS (X Series): "8x8's unified communications (UCaaS) and
  contact center (CCaaS) services, including our X Series." CPaaS and Video Meetings entries were
  removed because this SLA does not cover them.
- Exclusions: Scheduled Maintenance and Force Majeure are excluded from Unplanned Downtime; the
  Unplanned Downtime definition also excludes customer network/ISP/carrier/connectivity/device
  issues.
-->
